title: R:
content:
R:
Listening right now
This is a great beat

A:
https://youtu.be/a4Ujexj9YGs
Okay! And imagine that style, in an album format styled after this, which is the last half of Abbey Road

R:
Are you gonna get instruments again

A:
I'm gonna get the Ableton Push 2 and maybe a midi keyboard and that's it
Keep it minimal and restrict it

R:
Awesome
OK

A:
The push is also able to travel and function entirely from the instrument so I can bring it to you and plug it into your keyboard and stuff like that

R:
My keyboard is huge and not travel friendly lol

A:
I'm saying, I could bring the push to you and you record right into the machine

R:
Oh yes!!!

A:
Once I get a job, ill buy it as a reward for myself lol

R:
Excellent
I'm very very excited man
context: From document: Conversations on Music and Art and Life — chunk 3 (chunk 3/10)
